title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
